hug_mail_cockpit.label: Mail Cockpit
hug_mail_cockpit.twig_editor: Use Twig mode in the editor

composeModal.title: Send e-mail
composeModal.templateHelp: The template is loaded as a copy – changes here never modify the template.
composeModal.twigWarningText: The content contains Twig blocks that are displayed as plain text in the simple editor.
composeModal.noDocuments: No documents exist for this order yet.
composeModal.missingFields: Recipient, subject and content must not be empty.

variablePicker.hintValues: Click inserts the value from the order.

documentMapping.hint: Template preselected when sending a document of this type. Without a mapping the dispatch starts with an empty mail.

tab.label: E-mails
tab.noHistoryPermission: No permission to view the mail history.

history.emptyText: No e-mails have been archived for this record yet.
history.unavailableText: The FroshPlatformMailArchive plugin (≥ 3.6) is not installed or inactive.
history.previewPlaceholder: Click a mail in the list to see the preview — double click opens the full view.

previewCard.title: Test with a real order
previewCard.hint: Renders this template with the data of a real order — in the order's language. Missing flow variables are reported but do not block the preview.
previewCard.recipientHelp: The test mail contains the rendered result of this template.
previewCard.sendTestSuccess: The test mail has been sent.
previewCard.renderFailed: The template could not be rendered.

textSnippets.hint: Reusable text building blocks (greetings, standard answers) for composing e-mails. Simple variables (e.g. the order number from the variable picker) are allowed and replaced on dispatch.
textSnippets.saveSuccess: The text snippet has been saved.
